statements.sql: select count(*) as aggregate from "subscriptions" where "status" = 'active'
select count(*) as aggregate from "subscriptions" where "status" = 'trialing'
select count(*) as aggregate from "subscriptions" where "status" = 'past_due'
select count(*) as aggregate from "subscriptions" where "status" = 'canceled'
select count(*) as aggregate from "subscriptions" where "status" = 'incomplete'
select count(*) as aggregate from "subscriptions" where "status" = 'incomplete_expired'
select * from "subscriptions" order by "created_at" desc, "subscriptions"."id" desc limit 10 offset 0

select * from "products" where "products"."id" in ('01KBB0ESRKETG8SPEG5QPWNNHE', '01KBB0ESRZ1QAF4M1KQF1WW4AQ', '01KBB0ESS59KE7P65BZFQSAX96', '01KDD3KR2NJNNW2HSDWTXN9PHF') and "products"."deleted_at" is null

select * from "product_prices" where "product_prices"."id" in ('01KBB0E29F27VS03KR5BRF3KXV', '01KBB0ESRKETG8SPEG5QPWNNHD', '01KBB0ESRZ1QAF4M1KQF1WW4AP', '01KDD3KR2MJ95SFQCZMW4K2PNS') and "product_prices"."deleted_at" is null
select * from "orders" where "orders"."id" in (3, 6, 7, 10, 13) and "orders"."deleted_at" is null

select count(*) as aggregate from "notifications" where "notifications"."notifiable_type" = 'App\Models\AdminUser' and "notifications"."notifiable_id" = '01KBAZZ18W0VWD47744CK4B1MD' and "notifications"."notifiable_id" is not null and json_extract("data", '$."format"') = 'filament' and "read_at" is null
